domain_alignment.claim_boundary: truth-free descriptive applicability audit; no restored coverage guarantee

reference_sensitivity.claim_boundary: post-confirmatory frame-mapping tolerance sensitivity; not a GUM budget, traceability statement, or population-coverage estimate

field_example.selection_rule: lexicographically first known-domain case with pointwise point coverage >= 0.90, pointwise simultaneous failure, and DAS-FC simultaneous success

claim_boundary: post-confirmatory sensitivity, applicability diagnostics, and deterministic illustration; not new dense physical truth or population coverage
